dashboard.mealPlanBodyOne: {{name}} · {{count}} meals — tap to confirm the days
dashboard.mealPlanBodyMany: Customers are waiting for you to confirm the days
dashboard.docExpiresOn: {{document}} expires on {{date}}. Re-upload to keep your kitchen visible.
dashboard.fssaiLockedBody: Your kitchen is offline to customers. Renew your FSSAI licence to start accepting orders again.
dashboard.quietLastOrder: Last order {{ago}}. You're open and visible to customers.
dashboard.quietOpen: You're open and visible to customers. New orders will appear here.
dashboard.quietClosed: Tap the Closed button above to start receiving orders.
dashboard.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
dashboard.kitchenAccessibilityOpen: Kitchen is open. Tap to close or pause.
dashboard.kitchenAccessibilityPaused: Kitchen paused until {{time}}. Tap to reopen.
dashboard.kitchenAccessibilityClosed: Kitchen is closed. Tap to open.

orders.title: Orders
orders.queueClearBody: New orders will appear here automatically. Your queue is up to date.
orders.noCookingOrdersBody: Accepted orders will appear here while you prepare them.
orders.noOrdersBody: Once customers start ordering, you'll see them here.

earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.addPayoutHint: Tap to add a bank account or UPI ID
earnings.noOrdersInPeriodBody: Completed orders will appear here after your first payout cycle closes.
earnings.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.

onboarding.fulfillmentHint: Offer at least one — this is required before your kitchen can go live.
onboarding.selfDeliverySub: You drop orders to customers in your area
onboarding.fulfillmentError: Choose at least one — pickup or delivery.
onboarding.personalSubtitle: Your customers will see your name and contact details.
onboarding.emailLockedHint: Signed in with Google — cannot be changed here.
onboarding.emailVerifyPrompt: Verify this email to continue. We'll send a 6-digit code.
onboarding.emailCodeSent: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you.
onboarding.emailVerifyRequired: Please verify your email before continuing.
onboarding.emailOtpSendFailed: Couldn't send the code. Please try again.
onboarding.emailOtpWrong: That code is incorrect or expired.
onboarding.errFullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters
onboarding.errPhone: Enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number
onboarding.kitchenSubtitle: Name, cuisine, and where customers find you.
onboarding.aboutKitchenPlaceholder: Describe your kitchen, specialties, and cooking style (min 50 characters)
onboarding.searchAddressPlaceholder: Search PIN, area, or street name
onboarding.statePlaceholder: Tap a state below or type
onboarding.cityPlaceholderState: Tap a city below or type
onboarding.cityPlaceholderNoState: Pick a state, then tap or type
onboarding.noMatch: No match — fill the fields manually below.
onboarding.addressFilledLocation: Address filled from your location — adjust as needed.
onboarding.locationDenied: Location permission denied — enter your address manually.
onboarding.locationReadFailed: We couldn't read your address from GPS — enter it manually.
onboarding.locationLookupFailed: Location lookup failed — enter your address manually.
onboarding.errBusinessNameMin: Business name must be at least 3 characters
onboarding.errCuisineMin: Select at least one cuisine type
onboarding.errDescriptionMin: Description must be at least 50 characters
onboarding.errDescriptionMax: Description must be at most 500 characters
onboarding.errPin: PIN code must be exactly 6 digits
onboarding.operationsSubtitle: When you cook, how fast, and how far.
onboarding.whenYouCookHint: Toggle days on or off, then set your hours.
onboarding.prepTimeHint: Average time per order before it's ready.
onboarding.serviceRadiusHelper: Maximum distance from your kitchen to accept orders.
onboarding.radiusError: Service radius must be between 1 and 50 km
onboarding.documentsSubtitle: Required to verify your kitchen before you go live.
onboarding.documentsNote: Documents are reviewed privately and never shared with customers.
onboarding.tapToUpload: Tap a button below to upload
onboarding.expiryReminder: We'll remind you 30, 15, and 7 days before expiry.
onboarding.gstinHint: Skip if your turnover is below the GST threshold.
onboarding.kitchenMediaHint: Add at least one clear photo of your kitchen and a short walkthrough video for compliance review.
onboarding.kitchenMediaError: Add at least one kitchen photo and one walkthrough video before continuing.
onboarding.documentsRequiredBody: Please upload both ID proof and FSSAI license to continue.
onboarding.ocrDetected: We read the licence number and expiry — please check them.
onboarding.cameraDenied: Camera permission denied — tap Gallery to use a saved photo.
onboarding.galleryDenied: Gallery permission denied — please allow photo access in Settings.
onboarding.galleryFailed: Could not open gallery. Please try again.
onboarding.pickerFailed: Could not open document picker. Please try again.
onboarding.policiesSubtitle: Agree to our terms and set how you handle cancellations.
onboarding.termsBullet1: Maintain food hygiene standards per FSSAI regulations
onboarding.termsBullet2: Ensure accurate menu descriptions and pricing
onboarding.termsBullet3: Prepare orders within your stated prep time
onboarding.termsBullet4: Comply with all applicable local food safety laws
onboarding.termsBullet5: HomeChef may suspend accounts for repeated hygiene complaints
onboarding.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and conditions
onboarding.cancellationHint: Choose how customers can cancel orders placed with you.
onboarding.policyUpTo1Hour: Up to 1 hour before prep start
onboarding.policyUpTo30Mins: Up to 30 mins before prep start
onboarding.termsRequiredBody: Please accept the terms and conditions to continue.
onboarding.policyRequiredBody: Please select a cancellation policy to continue.
onboarding.reviewSubtitle: Confirm your details before sending the application.
onboarding.readyToSubmit: All required documents uploaded. Ready to submit.
onboarding.missingDocuments: Missing required documents — go back to Documents to upload.
onboarding.notApprovedBody: Your application was not approved. Review the feedback below and reapply when you're ready.
onboarding.reviewingBody: Our team will get back to you within 24–48 hours. You'll get a notification the moment your kitchen is approved.
onboarding.pendingHelper: You'll get the rest of the app once your kitchen is approved.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language for the app
